Division of Roles
1. Write a list of all the business management needs
Examples:
• General management
• Finance
• Marketing
• Sales
• HR/Payroll
• Legal compliance
2. After you have written down where the gaps lie and retrieve the job
descriptions (which you should already have) for each role.
3. Identify the skills/requirements needed for each role as well as the
responsibilities that are performed on a day-to-day basis.
Example:
Sales Skills/Requirements: High communication skills, confident, high
stress tolerance, analytical thinker, ability to develop rapport in a short
period of time.
4. Discuss WHO of the two of you has those skills, or if neither do.
5. Assign Ownership according to strengths.
6. Delegate weaknesses (hire for these first).
7. Keep 4Rs for you both in writing and on hand at all times.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
